data.subject_line: Application for Software Engineering Role - [Your Name]
data.body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the open engineering position at your company. With a solid foundation in software development and a proven track record of solving complex technical problems, I am confident in my ability to contribute effectively to your team.

While reviewing the role requirements, I was particularly drawn to your focus on scalable architecture and collaborative team environments. I am eager to bring my background in backend technologies to your projects and to continue growing as a developer.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my technical skills and passion for continuous learning align with your needs. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
